response.text:

rationale: Your SoC (45%) falls below our minimum sharing threshold (55%), and our own SoC is critically low (50.5%) in islanded operation—cannot spare 0.5 kWh without jeopardizing grid stability.

system: You are the reactive subroutine of a household energy-coordination agent. Be brief and decisive.
user:
